title: Fluffy Croatian Russet Potato Gratin
description: A malty, silky Croatian dish featuring katsuramuki-cut russet potatoes, perfect for a date night, cooked in a copper pot and suitable for a keto diet.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Butter the inside of a copper pot.
Create a layer of potatoes at the bottom of the pot.
Sprinkle a quarter of the gruyere cheese over the potatoes.
Drizzle a quarter of the heavy cream over the cheese.
Sprinkle a pinch of salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika over the cream.
Repeat the layering process three more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the pot with a lid and bake for 45 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
